menuName: Agatha Christie Style Phrases / Фразы в стиле Агаты Кристи
description: 50 advanced English phrases inspired by Agatha Christie style (no names or places)

lines.A: It was a most extraordinary circumstance.
One could scarcely believe such a thing.
There was something decidedly peculiar.
lines.B: В этом было нечто явно странное.

lines.A: I cannot account for this behavior.
lines.B: Я не могу объяснить это поведение.

lines.A: The matter requires careful consideration.
She spoke in a remarkably calm tone.
He appeared to be concealing something.
There was an air of quiet suspicion.
It struck me as highly improbable.
One must not jump to conclusions.
The truth will inevitably emerge.
It was said with deliberate emphasis.
lines.B: Это было сказано с намеренным акцентом.

lines.A: A curious detail caught my attention.
He gave a rather evasive reply.
The situation grew increasingly tense.
She seemed genuinely disturbed.
It was a matter of utmost importance.
He paused, as if weighing his words.
lines.B: Он сделал паузу, словно взвешивая слова.

lines.A: There was no denying the evidence.
The explanation was far from satisfactory.
A faint smile crossed her face.
lines.B: Лёгкая улыбка мелькнула на её лице.

lines.A: He regarded me with mild curiosity.
lines.B: Он посмотрел на меня с лёгким любопытством.

lines.A: Something in his manner was unsettling.
lines.B: В его манере было что-то тревожное.

lines.A: It was a singularly awkward moment.
She made a most unexpected remark.
The circumstances were highly suspicious.
He seemed reluctant to speak further.
lines.B: Он, казалось, не хотел говорить дальше.

lines.A: There was a certain irony in this.
It demanded immediate attention.
Her tone betrayed a hint of anxiety.
He offered no satisfactory explanation.
The matter was far more complex.
It was handled with great discretion.
lines.B: Это было сделано с большой осторожностью.

lines.A: One could detect a note of impatience.
She hesitated before replying.
There was an unmistakable tension.
He spoke as though nothing had happened.
lines.B: Он говорил так, словно ничего не произошло.

lines.A: It seemed a most unlikely coincidence.
The facts did not quite align.
She avoided answering directly.
There was little room for doubt.
lines.B: Места для сомнений почти не оставалось.

lines.A: He watched with quiet intensity.
It was not as simple as it appeared.
lines.B: Это было не так просто, как казалось.

lines.A: The remark was not without significance.
She gave him a searching look.
He seemed lost in thought.
The answer came after a long pause.
It was a detail easily overlooked.
lines.B: Это была деталь, которую легко упустить.

lines.A: Something about it was deeply troubling.
lines.B: В этом было что-то глубоко тревожное.

lines.A: The truth lay hidden beneath appearances.
